TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Fise o kalotamdaw : o kalotamdaw a matayalay ilaloma' no sofitay a tamdaw itini i kasasa'er-no'orip a faco no Indo.o sasafaay ko tireng itini Ylian-tamdaw. o maomahay ato paka'enay to 'a'adopen, ira ko inanengay matayal mahoped ko payso ato dafong malacipaysoay paliwalay-tamdaw, ciseraay, ato mipapacaliway to payso. Pinengnengan Kasasa'er no 'orip Polomen Satili Sotolo Tatiri'an a tilid
S.PHON: fis…ô o~u ka…ĺo~utam…¨~…ģaw : o~u ka…ĺo~utam…¨~…ģaw a mataja…ĺaj i…ĺa…ĺo~uma ° no~u so~ufitaj a tam…¨~…ģaw itini i kasasa °…ôr-no~u °o~urip a fa ¶o~u no~u in…¨~…ģo~u.o~u sasafaaj ko~u tir…ôŇč itini j…ĺian-tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u mao~umańßaj ato~u paka °…ônaj to~u °a °a…¨~…ģo~up…ôn, ira ko~u inan…ôŇčaj mataja…ĺ mańßo~up…ô…¨~…ģ ko~u pajso~u ato~u …¨~…ģafo~uŇč ma…ĺa ¶ipajso~uaj pa…ĺiwa…ĺaj-tam…¨~…ģaw, ¶is…ôraaj, ato~u mipapa ¶a…ĺiwaj to~u pajso~u. pin…ôŇčn…ôŇčan kasasa °…ôr no~u °o~urip po~u…ĺo~um…ôn sati…ĺi so~uto~u…ĺo~u tatiri °an a ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ
S.FORM: Fise o kalotamdaw : o kalotamdaw a matayalay ilaloma' no sofitay a tamdaw itini i kasasa'er-no'orip a faco no Indo.o sasafaay ko tireng itini Ylian-tamdaw. o maomahay ato paka'enay to 'a'adopen, ira ko inanengay matayal mahoped ko payso ato dafong malacipaysoay paliwalay-tamdaw, ciseraay, ato mipapacaliway to payso. Pinengnengan Kasasa'er no 'orip Polomen Satili Sotolo Tatiri'an a tilid
S.PHON: fis…ô o~u ka…ĺo~utam…¨~…ģaw : o~u ka…ĺo~utam…¨~…ģaw a mataja…ĺaj i…ĺa…ĺo~uma ° no~u so~ufitaj a tam…¨~…ģaw itini i kasasa °…ôr-no~u °o~urip a fa ¶o~u no~u in…¨~…ģo~u.o~u sasafaaj ko~u tir…ôŇč itini j…ĺian-tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u mao~umańßaj ato~u paka °…ônaj to~u °a °a…¨~…ģo~up…ôn, ira ko~u inan…ôŇčaj mataja…ĺ mańßo~up…ô…¨~…ģ ko~u pajso~u ato~u …¨~…ģafo~uŇč ma…ĺa ¶ipajso~uaj pa…ĺiwa…ĺaj-tam…¨~…ģaw, ¶is…ôraaj, ato~u mipapa ¶a…ĺiwaj to~u pajso~u. pin…ôŇčn…ôŇčan kasasa °…ôr no~u °o~urip po~u…ĺo~um…ôn sati…ĺi so~uto~u…ĺo~u tatiri °an a ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ
